calls.notes: Validates against hardcoded admin@docvault.local / bcrypt hash. Returns {token, refreshToken} on 200; {error} on 400 (missing fields) or 401 (wrong credentials). No database access — credentials are hardcoded in the route file.

BUG (FR-007): Backend verifies the refresh JWT correctly but returns {session:{userId, email, createdAt}} instead of {token, refreshToken}. AuthContext immediately calls refreshResponse.data.token.split('.') — token is undefined — crashing with TypeError unconditionally whenever valid credentials are submitted. The localStorage overwrite at AuthContext.jsx:85 is therefore never reached.
